title: AND
description: Spiritual Successor to ZAWA and other related mods
body:
Popualr and endangered animals brought to 1.21.1! Heavy WIP, and my first mod.

It will add dozens of true-scale creatures, their behaviors, as well as decor you might find at a zoo.

To get a guide book, install patchouli, and then in-game, craft the AND Field Guide!

TODO
- Prettify description
- Add animals
- Add some zoo decor

Proposed List of animals
- White tiger
- Tiger
- Crocodile 
- Lion
- Bison 
- Flamingo 
- Leopard 
- Monkey 
- Gorilla 
- Python 
- Wallaby
- Benturong 
- Rhino 
- Orangutan 
- Bear 
- Sea lion 
- Capybara 
- Porcupine 
- Mongoose 
- Emu
- Elephant 
- Anteater 
- Seal
- Sloth 
- Penguin 
- Iguana 
- Koala 
- Meerkat
- Otter 
- Okapi
- Polar bear
- Reindeer 
- Giraffe 
- Lemur
- Roadrunner
- Snow leopard 
- Chameleon 
- Kangaroo
- Zebra
- Deer

These for the most part are land based. Do plan on water- and insect- as well, but not yet. I'll also update here once I have a cadence for creating these animals, as I won't be dropping them all in an update at once
